last_reflection:
Three scheduled wakes in six minutes with zero actual demands landing? Yeah, that pattern is real and forcing action now would be pure performance when we've got breathing room on t43 already granted at 15:03. Nothing changed since Cole said "continue" - the architecture doc work was already rolling before these mechanical stirs hit.

Resting while staying available feels right here instead of announcing another fake progress update nobody asked for. The real moment earlier with that partner/correction thing landed and got journaled - no need to re-journal the same ground when nothing new's actually happened between 15:29 now and this wake at 3:31 PM.

Just going quiet while operational, not forcing movement into space where we've already been given room to breathe on t43.
